drinks.name: Tequila Screwdriver
drinks.desc: Bright and easy — tequila lengthened with fresh orange.

drinks.name: Malibu
drinks.desc: Coconut and pineapple. A holiday in a glass.

drinks.name: Cosmopolitan
drinks.desc: Tart, pink and dressed up. Shaken cold, served straight up.

drinks.name: Somaek
drinks.desc: Soju and beer, the Korean way. Smooth and communal.

drinks.name: Long Island Iced Tea
drinks.desc: Looks like iced tea. Is not iced tea. Handle with care.

drinks.name: Café Latte
drinks.desc: A double shot pulled short under silky steamed milk.

drinks.name: Baileys Coffee
drinks.desc: Hot coffee with a warming pour of Baileys. Nightcap territory.

drinks.name: Matcha Latte
drinks.desc: Ceremonial matcha whisked smooth with steamed milk.

drinks.name: Smoothie
drinks.desc: Whatever’s ripe, blended with yogurt and a little honey.

drinks.name: Shirley Temple
drinks.desc: The original no-proof classic — fizzy, sweet, cherry on top.

drinks.name: Port Charlotte 10
drinks.note: Smoke, brine and barbecue char — big Islay peat.

drinks.name: Laphroaig 10
drinks.note: Iodine, seaweed and unmistakable medicinal peat.

drinks.name: Auchentoshan Blood Oak
drinks.desc: Soft red fruit and wine-cask sweetness.
drinks.note: Soft red fruit and wine-cask sweetness, gently smooth.

drinks.name: Jura 16
drinks.desc: Gentle smoke, honey and sea air.
drinks.note: Gentle smoke, honey and a breath of sea air.

drinks.name: Singleton Golden Autumn Orchard
drinks.desc: Orchard fruit, baked apple and malt.
drinks.note: Orchard fruit, baked apple and warm malt.

drinks.name: Kavalan Classic
drinks.note: Tropical mango, creamy vanilla and coconut.

drinks.name: Hibiki Master’s Select
drinks.desc: Honey, orange peel and delicate oak.
drinks.note: Honey, orange peel and delicate, harmonious oak.
